title: neottia uraiensis
intro: Neottia uraiensis, also known as Urai orchid, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family, specifically belonging to the subfamily Neottioideae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral activities. The Urai orchid has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as a natural remedy for wounds. In herbal preparations, Neottia uraiensis is often made into a tea or a tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although its efficacy and safety need further scientific research.
